name: UX/Interaction Design
definition: Designing user experiences and interaction patterns for digital products, including wireframing, user flows, and usability principles.
positive_examples: インタラクションデザイン

name: Prototyping & Rapid Iteration
definition: Building interactive prototypes to test concepts quickly, iterating based on feedback, and converging on validated designs.

name: User Research & Usability Testing
definition: Planning and conducting user research, usability tests, and synthesizing findings into actionable design insights.
positive_examples: ユーザビリティテスト

name: Experience Coherence & Concept-to-Spec
definition: Translating abstract concepts into concrete specifications while maintaining holistic experience coherence across touchpoints.
positive_examples: コンセプトから仕様への変換

name: Systems Architecture & Integration
definition: Designing and implementing system architectures, including component integration, API design, and managing technical dependencies.

name: Performance Profiling & Optimization
definition: Identifying and resolving performance bottlenecks through profiling, benchmarking, and optimization techniques.
positive_examples: パフォーマンス最適化

name: Debugging & Root Cause Analysis
definition: Systematically diagnosing and resolving software issues through debugging techniques and root cause analysis.

name: Technical Constraints Management
definition: Working effectively within platform, hardware, or framework constraints; making trade-off decisions under technical limitations.

name: PoC Evaluation & Kill/Merge Decisions
definition: Evaluating proof-of-concept results and making data-driven decisions to kill, merge, or advance prototypes.

name: Fidelity Raising & Convergence
definition: Progressively increasing the fidelity of prototypes from rough concepts to production-ready implementations.

name: R&D Process & Methodology
definition: Applying structured R&D methodologies including experiment design, hypothesis testing, and iterative research cycles.

name: Cross-Functional Collaboration
definition: Working effectively across disciplines (engineering, design, product, business) to align goals and deliver outcomes.

name: Technical-to-Non-Technical Translation
definition: Translating complex technical concepts into language and formats understandable by non-technical stakeholders.
positive_examples: 技術的概念の非技術者への伝達

name: Internal/External Orchestration
definition: Coordinating work streams across internal teams and external partners, vendors, or contractors.
positive_examples: 外部パートナーとの連携

name: Executive Documentation & Decision Support
definition: Creating concise documentation for executive decision-making, including proposals, trade-off analyses, and strategic recommendations.

name: Spatial UI / XR Interfaces
definition: Designing and developing interfaces for spatial computing, XR (AR/VR/MR), and 3D interaction paradigms.

name: Emerging Interaction Paradigms
definition: Exploring and implementing novel interaction patterns beyond traditional GUI, including voice, gesture, haptics, and ambient computing.
positive_examples: 新しいインタラクションパラダイム

name: Game Engine & Real-Time 3D
definition: Working with game engines (Unity, Unreal, Godot) and real-time 3D rendering for interactive experiences.

name: AI-Assisted Development & Tooling
definition: Using AI tools (Copilot, ChatGPT, etc.) to accelerate development workflows, including code generation, review, and debugging.

name: AI/ML Evaluation & Critical Thinking
definition: Critically evaluating AI/ML outputs, understanding model limitations, and making informed decisions about when to trust or override AI suggestions.

name: LLM Integration & Prompt Design
definition: Integrating large language models into products and workflows, including prompt engineering, RAG systems, and output validation.

name: Frontend Development
definition: Building user-facing web or app interfaces using frontend frameworks and technologies.

name: Backend / API Development
definition: Building server-side logic, APIs, and data processing pipelines.

name: Design Tools Proficiency
definition: Expert use of design and prototyping tools such as Figma, Sketch, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent.

name: Version Control & CI/CD
definition: Using version control systems (Git) and continuous integration/deployment pipelines effectively.

name: Python Development
definition: Building applications, scripts, and tooling using Python and its ecosystem.

name: Technical Leadership & Mentoring
definition: Leading technical teams, mentoring junior developers, setting technical direction, and fostering engineering culture.
positive_examples: テクニカルリーダーシップ

name: Team Building & Culture
definition: Building high-performing teams, establishing engineering culture, and creating psychologically safe environments.

name: Written Communication & Documentation
definition: Clear, effective written communication including technical writing, proposals, and documentation.
positive_examples: 文書コミュニケーション

name: Presentation & Public Speaking
definition: Delivering clear, engaging presentations to technical and non-technical audiences.

name: Multilingual Communication
definition: Working effectively in multiple languages, including professional communication in both English and Japanese.
positive_examples: 多言語コミュニケーション

name: Product Thinking & Strategy
definition: Understanding user needs, market context, and business goals to inform product decisions and feature prioritization.

name: Agile & Iterative Development
definition: Working within agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and embracing iterative development with regular feedback loops.

name: Data-Driven Decision Making
definition: Using quantitative data, metrics, and analytics to inform decisions rather than relying solely on intuition.
positive_examples: データドリブン意思決定

name: Quality Assurance & Testing Strategy
definition: Designing and implementing test strategies including unit, integration, and end-to-end testing for software quality.

name: Portfolio & Self-Presentation
definition: Packaging and presenting one's work effectively through portfolios, case studies, and professional branding.

name: Continuous Learning & Adaptability
definition: Rapidly learning new technologies, domains, and methodologies; adapting to changing requirements and contexts.

name: Creative Technology & Digital Art
definition: Combining creative arts with technology, including generative art, creative coding, and digital media production.
positive_examples: クリエイティブテクノロジー

name: Hardware/Software Interface
definition: Working at the intersection of hardware and software, including embedded systems, IoT, physical prototyping, and sensor integration.
positive_examples: ハードウェア・ソフトウェア連携

name: Accessibility & Inclusive Design
definition: Designing and building products that are accessible to users with diverse abilities, following WCAG and inclusive design principles.
